# Conflicting Style Rules (intentional)

This fixture intentionally contains contradictions to exercise conflict detection later.

## Imports

- MUST use absolute imports rooted at `src/`.
- MUST use relative imports between sibling files.

## Quoting

- MUST always use single quotes.
- MUST always use double quotes.

## Tests

- MUST place tests next to the file under test.
- MUST place tests in a top-level `tests/` directory.
